title: eragrostis crateriformis
intro: Eragrostis crateriformis is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eragrostis crateriformis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or infuse the plant in oil for topical application.
